about.title: About BackerHub
about.subtitle: Asia's premier player backing marketplace
about.missionDesc: We're bridging the gap between poker talent and smart backers across Asia. Our platform makes it simple, secure, and transparent to back poker players in tournaments or sell your action to a community that believes in your skills.
about.howDesc: Poker staking is when backers buy a percentage of a player's tournament entry. If the player wins, backers receive their proportional share of the winnings. It's a way for backers to participate in poker tournament results and for players to reduce risk and play more events.
about.forInvestorsDesc: Browse verified players with tracked performance. Buy action from 1% to 100% of tournament entries. Diversify across multiple players and events for optimized returns.
about.forPlayersDesc: List your tournament entries with your preferred markup. Attract backers to fund your buy-ins. Focus on playing your best while backers share the risk.

faq.a1: Poker staking is when a backer buys a percentage of a poker player's tournament entry. If the player wins, the backer receives their proportional share of the prize. It allows backers to participate in poker tournament results and helps players manage the variance of tournament play.
faq.q2: How do I start backing players?
faq.a2: Create a free account, verify your identity, deposit funds using your preferred payment method, then browse the marketplace for players and tournaments that match your criteria. You can buy as little as 1% of any listing.
faq.a3: Markup is the premium a player charges above the base cost. A 1.10x markup means you pay 10% more than the base action price. Higher-rated players typically command higher markups. A $1,000 buy-in with 10% action at 1.10x markup would cost $110 instead of $100.
faq.a4: When a player cashes in a tournament, BackerHub verifies the results with the official tournament organizer. Winnings are then automatically distributed to all backers proportionally within 10 business days.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you support?
faq.a5: We support crypto payments via USDT and USDC on the TRC-20 (Tron) network. This allows fast, borderless transactions with minimal fees. We also support Bitcoin and Ethereum for future expansion.
faq.a6: All players on BackerHub are identity-verified. We track performance history and verify tournament results through official sources. Funds are held in escrow until tournament completion. However, poker tournaments are inherently variable — not every tournament entry results in a cash.
faq.a7: No. BackerHub is a player sponsorship platform for competitive mind sport events. Poker tournaments (MTT) are recognized as skill-based mind sport competitions in Taiwan. Our platform facilitates sponsorship of tournament players — backers fund a player's entry and share in any prize winnings. This is fundamentally different from gambling, as outcomes are determined by player skill in a competitive setting.
faq.q8: Is poker staking legal in Taiwan?
faq.a8: Yes. Multi-table poker tournaments (MTT) are recognized as competitive mind sport events in Taiwan and are legally operated by registered associations such as CTP. BackerHub facilitates player sponsorship for these legal tournament events. We do not support cash games, which remain prohibited. Our platform operates as a sponsorship and escrow service, not a gambling platform.

aboutPage.title: About BackerHub
aboutPage.subtitle: Asia's most trusted player backing platform
aboutPage.missionDescription: We're building the infrastructure of trust for competitive poker. By combining escrow-protected staking with transparent verification at every step, we make it possible for talented players to access backing and for backers to participate in tournament poker — all with institutional-grade risk management.
aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Built by professionals from finance and technology

member1.name: Co-Founder
member1.background: Former auditor at a Big Four accounting firm with extensive experience in investment banking compliance, financial controls, and risk management. Brings deep expertise in building trustworthy financial systems, regulatory compliance, and escrow fund management to ensure every dollar on BackerHub is accounted for.
member1.quote: Trust is built through transparency and accountability. Every transaction on BackerHub goes through the same rigor I'd apply to an institutional audit.

member2.name: Co-Founder
member2.background: Former AI engineer at a quantitative hedge fund, building machine learning models for market analysis and automated trading systems. Applies the same data-driven, systematic approach to platform architecture, player analytics, and risk scoring algorithms that power BackerHub's reliability metrics.
member2.quote: The best systems are the ones that make the right thing easy and the wrong thing hard. That's what we've built into every step of the staking flow.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: Every fee, every fund movement, every verification step is visible to all parties. No hidden costs, no black boxes.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Escrow protection, withdrawal locks, multi-step verification, and enforced deadlines. Your money is protected at every stage.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Built for the Asian poker community. Supporting local payment methods, local languages, and the tournaments you actually play.

excellence.title: Operational Excellence
excellence.description: Combining finance-grade compliance with cutting-edge technology. Every process is designed, tested, and continuously improved.

aboutPage.whyDescription: We're the only poker staking platform that combines escrow-protected fund management, multi-step admin verification, player reliability scoring, and enforced settlement deadlines into a single seamless experience. Whether you're a player looking for backing or a backer looking for exposure to tournament poker, we've built the safest way to do it.
aboutPage.contactCtaDesc: Our team is here to help. Reach out to us anytime — we speak English and Chinese.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or partnership inquiry? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.

flowIntro.title: How the Staking Flow Works
flowIntro.subtitle: A complete walkthrough of our risk-balanced staking lifecycle — from listing creation to prize settlement. Every step is designed to protect both players and backers.

listing.title: Player Creates Listing
listing.description: A player lists their upcoming tournament on the marketplace — setting the buy-in, markup rate, and percentage of action available. Backers can browse and evaluate the opportunity based on the player's verified stats, ROI history, and reliability score.

backing.title: Backers Purchase Action
backing.description: Backers buy a percentage of the player's tournament action. Each purchase is processed through our platform with transparent cost breakdowns showing base cost, markup, and platform fee. Once all offered action is sold, the listing becomes fully funded.

escrow.title: Funds Held in Escrow
escrow.description: All backer payments are held securely in escrow — not released directly to the player. This ensures backers' money is protected until the admin verifies the listing is ready for buy-in release. The player cannot access these funds without completing the next verification step.

buyinRelease.title: Admin Releases Buy-in
buyinRelease.description: An admin reviews the fully funded listing and releases the buy-in amount (plus markup) from escrow to the player's wallet. The player now has the funds to register for the tournament. A 48-hour deadline is set for the player to provide proof of registration.

registration.title: Player Confirms Registration
registration.description: The player uploads proof of tournament registration (screenshot or URL). An admin verifies the proof and confirms registration. This step ensures the player actually enters the tournament with the released funds, rather than keeping the money.

tournament.title: Tournament Takes Place
tournament.description: The player competes in the tournament. During this phase, the listing is locked — no changes can be made. Everyone waits for the tournament to conclude and results to become available.

result.title: Player Submits Result
result.description: After the tournament ends, the player submits their result: Win (with prize amount and finish position), Loss, or Cancelled. The player can include proof links and notes. An admin reviews and verifies the result against official tournament records.

deposit.title: Prize Deposit (Win Only)
deposit.description: For winning results: the player must deposit the backers' share of prize money back to the platform. This is the critical trust mechanism — prize money doesn't appear from nowhere, the player physically received it and must return the backers' portion. Player withdrawals are locked during this period.

settlement.title: Settlement Complete
settlement.description: For wins: deposited prize money is distributed proportionally to all backers based on their share percentage. For losses: backers receive nothing (this is the inherent risk). For cancellations: full refund from escrow. Player stats and reliability scores are updated.

win.title: Player Cashes
win.description: The player finishes in the money and receives a prize. Backers share in the winnings proportionally.
win.step1: Player deposits backer share to platform

loss.title: Player Busts
loss.description: The player doesn't finish in the money. This is the inherent variance of tournament poker.

cancelled.title: Tournament Cancelled
cancelled.description: The tournament is cancelled by the organizer. All backers are made whole.
cancelled.step1: Full refund from escrow to backers

protection.title: Built-in Risk Protection
protection.subtitle: Every step of the flow is designed to minimize risk and maximize trust between players and backers.

escrowProtection.title: Escrow Protection
escrowProtection.description: Backer funds are never sent directly to players. All money is held in escrow until admin-verified milestones are reached.

withdrawalLock.title: Withdrawal Lock
withdrawalLock.description: Players cannot withdraw any funds from their wallet while they have pending prize deposits. This prevents escape after winning.

deadlines.title: Enforced Deadlines
deadlines.description: 48 hours for registration proof, tournament date + 3 days for results, and 14 days for prize deposits. Missed deadlines trigger admin review.

verification.title: Multi-step Verification
verification.description: Every critical action — registration, results, deposits — requires admin verification against official records before proceeding.

reliability.title: Reliability Scoring
reliability.description: Player profiles display a reliability score based on on-time settlements vs defaults. Backers can assess trustworthiness before backing.

moneyFlow.title: How Money Moves
moneyFlow.backingNote: Funds secured, not released to player
moneyFlow.settlementNote: Player deposits backer share → Platform verifies → Distributed proportionally to each backer based on their % of action purchased

preLaunch.bannerSub: Back players for free during our launch period — no commission, no hidden costs.

legal.disclaimerBanner: BackerHub is a player sponsorship platform for skill-based mind sport competition. Not a gambling or securities platform.
legal.checkoutDisclaimer: By completing this purchase, you are sponsoring a player's tournament entry. Returns are based on tournament results and are not guaranteed. This is not a securities offering or gambling transaction.
legal.mindSportNotice: Poker tournaments (MTT) are recognized as competitive mind sport events in Taiwan.
legal.riskDisclaimer: Sponsoring tournament players involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. You may lose some or all of your sponsorship amount.
legal.platformDescription: BackerHub is a player sponsorship platform that connects skilled poker tournament players with backers. We facilitate the staking process for legally sanctioned multi-table tournament (MTT) events recognized as competitive mind sport competitions.
legal.natureOfServiceDesc: BackerHub provides a marketplace for poker tournament staking — a standard practice in professional poker where backers fund a player's tournament entry in exchange for a proportional share of any prize winnings. This is player sponsorship, not gambling, securities trading, or financial investment advice.
legal.userResponsibilitiesDesc: Users must be at least 18 years of age. Backers acknowledge that tournament results are variable and that backing a player does not guarantee returns. Players must participate in listed tournaments in good faith and report results accurately.
legal.riskDisclosureDesc: Poker tournaments involve inherent variance. Even highly skilled players may not cash in any given tournament. Backers should only use funds they can afford to lose. Past player performance does not guarantee future results. BackerHub does not provide financial or investment advice.
legal.escrowTermsDesc: All backing funds are held in escrow by BackerHub until tournament completion. Prize winnings are verified through official tournament sources and distributed proportionally to backers within 10 business days. In case of tournament cancellation, escrowed funds are returned in full.
legal.governingLawDesc: These terms are governed by the laws of Taiwan (R.O.C.). BackerHub operates in compliance with applicable regulations governing competitive mind sport events and player sponsorship. We do not support or facilitate cash games, online gambling, or any activities prohibited under Taiwan law.
legal.mttOnlyDesc: BackerHub exclusively supports multi-table tournament (MTT) poker events operated by legally registered associations and organizations. Cash games are not supported on this platform under any circumstances.
